name: Legacy Mesh Shorts | "Cracked"
description_html: These shorts offer a regular fit, ideal for comfort and ease of movement, and are pre-washed to prevent shrinkage. The male model, 5'11" and 180 lbs, is shown wearing a size L, while the female model, 5'9" and 150 lbs, wears a size S. Women are recommended to size down by one size for the best fit. For care, machine wash in cold water with similar colors and hang dry, though tumble drying on low is also an option.

name: SUPERHUMAN SLEEP - PM Sleep Aid and Fat Burner.†
description_html:
• Supports fat loss & muscle gain goals†
  • Promotes faster recovery & less soreness after intense workouts†
  • Supports REM Sleep for maximum anabolic hormones†
  • Replenish crucial electrolytes so you wake up feeling amazing†
  • Skyrockets the speed of your body transformation†

[end-short-description]

SUPERHUMAN SLEEP
BEDTIME FAT BURNER & MUSCLE BUILDER†

 

SUPERHUMAN SLEEP is the X-Factor to gaining muscle and targeting soft spots†
It was developed for men and women looking to support muscle growth and fat loss goals while getting healthy sleep.

SUPERHUMAN SLEEP is as powerful as it is versatile.

If your goal is to build muscle as fast as scientifically possible - SUPERHUMAN SLEEP is for you.

Maximizing your rate of recovery and the amount of REM sleep that you get each night is more important than anything.
We suggest that you Combine SUPERHUMAN SLEEP with a 500 calorie surplus and intense workouts to take your muscle building goals to the stratosphere!

Every amino acid, electrolyte, and mineral that your body needs before bed to promote muscle growth is found within SuperHuman Sleep’s cutting edge, premium formula.

If your goal is to build burn fat as fast as scientifically possible and target your soft spots - SUPERHUMAN SLEEP is tailor made for you!

We suggest that you Combine SUPERHUMAN SLEEP with a 500 calorie deficit and your regular training routine to amplify your results to the next level!

Every amino acid, electrolyte, and mineral that your body needs before bed to promote a fast metabolism and get more REM sleep to speed up fat loss is found within SuperHuman Sleep’s cutting edge, premium formula.

If your goal is to build muscle and burn fat at the same, aka a “recomp” you just found the best supplement on the planet to do just that!

We suggest you combine Superhuman Sleep with around maintenance level calories and an intense workout regimen to accelerate your body transformation goals ten-fold!†

6 Powerful Matrix’s combine to help you sleep better and build muscle and burn fat simultaneously in combination with a diet and exercise program. The synergistic combination of these 6 Matrix’s will give you an unfair body transformation advantage and allow you to build muscle and incinerate soft spots at the speed of sound!

  • Amino Growth Matrix
  • ZMA Recovery Matrix
  • HGH Matrix
  • Tranquility Matrix
  • Anti-Stress Matrix
  • Absorption Matrix


†These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

name: Utility Sweatpants
description_html: These sweatpants offer a relaxed, tapered fit and are pre-washed to prevent shrinkage. The male model, 5'11" and 180 lbs, wears a size L, while the female model, 5'9" and 150 lbs, is shown in a size XS. For the best fit, women are advised to size down by one size, while men may prefer to size up one size for a more relaxed, loose fit. For care, machine wash cold with similar colors; hang drying is recommended, though tumble drying on low is also an option.

name: Women's Flex Leggings
description_html: These leggings feature a high-waisted waistband and a form-fitting design that feels like a gentle hug. They are ⅞ length with a 27” inseam and come pre-washed for anti-shrink protection. The model, who is 5'9" and 150 lbs, is shown wearing a size S. For a more "snatched" fit, sizing down by one size is recommended. For care, machine wash cold with similar colors; hang drying is preferred, though tumble drying on low is also possible.

name: Women's Flex Tank
description_html: This top features a form-fitting design that feels like a soft hug and a cropped length. It runs large, so sizing down by one size is recommended for the best fit. Pre-washed for anti-shrink protection, it’s easy to care for—machine wash cold with similar colors, and hang drying is recommended, though tumble drying on low is also possible. The model, 5'9" and 150 lbs, wears a size XS.
